description: Fix Features Backlog Defects - Close backlog defects and TODO items in FEATURES.md, focusing on undo/redo, hierarchy editing, open/save flows, and Java generation reliability

userStories.title: Batch undo history for drag and resize
userStories.description: As a user, I want a completed drag or resize to create a single undo step so history stays usable.
acceptanceCriteria: A drag or resize action adds one final history entry when the interaction ends
Pointer-move updates do not flood the undo stack
Existing undo and redo behavior still works for non-drag state changes
Resize interactions preserve the final component geometry
Targeted tests cover drag and resize history behavior
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Ctrl+S save shortcut
userStories.description: As a user, I want Ctrl+S or Cmd+S to save the layout so I can persist changes without using the toolbar.
acceptanceCriteria: Ctrl+S and Cmd+S trigger the existing save layout command from the webview
The shortcut does not fire while the user is typing in an input, textarea, or contenteditable field
Undo, redo, and delete shortcuts continue to work as they do today
Shortcut handling is covered by tests
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show guided recovery when the layout file is missing
userStories.description: As a user, I want a clear recovery message when the layout file is missing so I know what to do next.
acceptanceCriteria: The open command handles the missing-file case as a guided, non-fatal path
The user sees an actionable message that points to creating a new layout or initializing a project
The extension logs a clear recovery message instead of a generic error stack trace
Tests cover the missing-file branch
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create an empty layout when the file is missing
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to create an empty layout when the file is missing so I can start immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: The open command can initialize an empty CanvasState with MainWindow defaults when the file is missing
The new layout opens with default dimensions and zero components
The created layout can be saved immediately without additional setup
Tests cover default state creation and loading
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Propagate inferred package to generated Java files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the inferred Java package to reach the generator so generated files compile correctly in structured and simple projects.
acceptanceCriteria: The generate command passes the inferred packageName to generateJavaFiles()
Generated Java files include a package declaration when the project structure supports it
Maven/Gradle and simple-project inference cases are covered by tests
Missing or incomplete project metadata is handled without breaking generation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose event method name in the properties panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit the event method name from the properties panel so I can control the generated stub names.
acceptanceCriteria: The properties panel renders an eventMethodName field for supported component types
The field validates Java method naming rules and rejects invalid input
Changes persist to canvas state and are reflected in generated method stubs
Duplicate names are handled consistently with the existing generator behavior
Tests cover rendering, validation, and state update behavior
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Respect JFrame background color in preview
userStories.description: As a user, I want the JFrame preview to use the configured background color so the preview matches the component state.
acceptanceCriteria: The preview rendering uses the JFrame backgroundColor from component state
Changing the background color updates the preview immediately
The default behavior remains stable when no explicit background color is set
Tests cover the preview color path for the JFrame
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Generalize hierarchy drag-and-drop rules
userStories.description: As a user, I want hierarchy drag-and-drop to support the full component set so I can reorganize the canvas consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: resolveDropInstruction() handles supported component families beyond menu-only cases
The hierarchy view shows clear drop target indicators for valid positions
Valid reparenting works for supported component types without breaking existing menu behavior
Invalid parent-child combinations are rejected
Tests cover representative component families and target positions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Allow unparenting to root and block invalid cycles
userStories.description: As a user, I want to move components back to the root level and avoid invalid hierarchy cycles so the canvas state stays valid.
acceptanceCriteria: A supported component can be moved back to the root when the move is valid
Moving a component into one of its descendants or any equivalent cycle is blocked
The hierarchy tree and canvas state remain consistent after reparenting
Tests cover unparenting and cycle prevention
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Generate hierarchical folder structure for code output
userStories.description: As a developer, I want generated Java files to mirror the component hierarchy in folders so the output is easier to navigate and maintain.
acceptanceCriteria: Output folders mirror the component hierarchy derived from the canvas tree
Parent components own a folder that contains their descendant classes
File naming remains deterministic and does not break existing output conventions
Flat layouts continue to generate valid output without special-case handling
Tests cover nested tree generation and the flat-layout fallback
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add a dedicated JFrame configuration action
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated JFrame configuration action so I can edit size, colors, and title in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: The toolbar or equivalent primary action surface exposes a dedicated JFrame configuration action
The configuration UI allows editing width, height, background color, and title
Changes update the canvas state and are reflected in generated code
Validation prevents invalid size or color values from being applied
Tests cover the state update and validation behavior
Typecheck passes
